So what is a "repechage round," you may ask?

The World Athletics Council approved the format change ahead of the 2024 track and field competition at theParis Olympics.

The specifics are pretty simple.

Olympic track and field athletes who do not automatically qualify through the first round of action in the 200m, 400m, 800m, 1,500m, 100mH, 110mH and 400mH will be granted an additional round to secure their spots into the semifinals.

Athletes who automatically qualify through to the semifinals will continue their medal quest, with a potential three rounds of competition. Athletes who do not qualify initially, however, will have as many as four rounds.

Each athlete in those event disciplines will be guaranteed at least two rounds of competition.

World Athletics President Seb Coe said of the format change, "the repechage rounds will give more exposure to our sport during the peak Olympic period and will be carefully scheduled to ensure that every event on our Olympic program retains its share of the spotlight."

August 5 -- Men's 200m Round 1

August 6 - Men's 200m Repechage Round

August 7 - Men's 200m Semifinal

August 8 - Men's 200m Final

August 4 - Men's 400m Round 1

August 5 - Men's 400m Repechage Round

August 6 - Men's 400m Semifinal

August 7 - Men's 400m Final

August 7 - Men's 800m Round 1

August 8 - Men's 800m Repechage Round

August 9 - Men's 800m Semifinal

August 2 - Men's 1,500m Round 1

August 3 - Men's 1,500m Repechage Round

August 4 - Men's 1,500m Semifinal

August 6 - Men's 1,500m Final

August 4 - Men's 110mH  Round 1

August 7 - Men's 400mH Semifinal

August 9 - Men's 400mH Final

August 6 - Women's 400mH Semifinal

August 8 - Women's 400mH Final

The Olympics begin on July 26 and end on August 11. The track and field events will begin on Aug. 1.

title: What Is A Repechage Round At The 2024 Olympics? Here's What To Know - FloTrack
description: The World Athletics Council initiated an innovative format change to Olympic track and field in 2024, adding a repechage round, or a "lucky losers" heat.
